/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/TerrariaClone.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/TerrariaClone.dir/main.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/TerrariaClone.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/TerrariaClone.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/TerrariaClone.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/TerrariaClone.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/TerrariaClone.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_demo.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/TerrariaClone.dir/_deps/rlimgui-src/rlImGui.cpp.o" -o TerrariaClone  /usr/lib/libraylib.so.6.0.0 -lm
